meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Master Antigravity Templates for SaaS
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with SaaS architecture. Learn to deploy professional-grade projects instantly using the Antigravity template and Claude Code workflow.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates SaaS complexity by providing a pre-configured, production-ready stack. By pairing it with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate, enforce architectural standards, and ship high-value client features in hours rather than weeks, effectively bypassing the steep learning curve of traditional full-stack development.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and you're staring at a blank terminal, paralyzed by the sheer weight of setting up authentication, database migrations, and CI/CD pipelines. You’re a talented developer, but 'no SaaS knowledge' shouldn't be the bottleneck that keeps you from scaling your freelance business to high-ticket consulting.

Today, we shatter that barrier. We aren't building from scratch; we are deploying an ecosystem. By leveraging the Antigravity project template—a battle-tested foundation—and the cognitive power of Claude Code, you will transform from a coder into a SaaS architect capable of shipping enterprise-grade applications at breakneck speed.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Skeleton
steps.description: Establish the foundational project structure that handles common SaaS pain points like user management and billing out of the box.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity SaaS base template with Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe integration enabled.

steps.title: Configure the Claude Code Environment
steps.description: Sync your local environment with Claude Code to ensure the AI understands your project structure and architectural constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory and map the architecture for Claude Code to ensure it follows the Antigravity convention.

steps.title: Implement Domain-Specific Logic
steps.description: Inject your client’s unique business logic into the template without breaking the underlying SaaS infrastructure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a new feature module for a subscription-based document processor, following the existing Antigravity service-layer pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate a new service module for document processing using the existing pattern'

steps.title: Automate Database Migrations
steps.description: Use the template's built-in migration tools to safely sync your schema changes without manual SQL overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a migration file that adds a 'usage_quota' column to the 'profiles' table and update the Supabase types.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Run migration script to update user profile schema'

steps.title: Perform Automated Security Audit
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to perform a final security sweep on your implementation against known SaaS vulnerabilities.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase for potential security vulnerabilities regarding Row Level Security (RLS) and API endpoint exposure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Perform security audit and fix any RLS policy gaps'

pro_tips: Always use the '--dry-run' flag in your CLI commands when testing new Antigravity modules to prevent accidental database overwrites.
Maintain a 'context.md' file in your root folder; Claude Code reads this automatically to keep your coding style consistent across large projects.
Leverage the Antigravity 'service-layer' pattern to keep your business logic decoupled from the UI, making client-requested UI changes trivial.
Use Claude Code to generate your unit tests immediately after implementing a feature—it keeps your tech debt near zero.
Map your database schema to a visual ERD diagram inside your project folder; it helps Claude Code understand complex relational data faster.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, focus on setting up automated deployment pipelines via GitHub Actions and integrating your client's custom domain.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact workflow used by top-tier SaaS engineers to bypass months of R&D. Stop building the same authentication boilerplate and start shipping actual value. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
